text: Please remove the faulty C12 cap and solder on a new one from the fresh batch. Need to check ESR value after.
C12 capacitor looks burnt, replace it immediately. Re-test ESR and do a full functional test to be sure.
De-solder C12 and put a new one. The ESR must be within spec or the whole board is scrap.
swap C12 cap with the supplier replacement. run funct. behavior check afterwards.
Re-solder the C12 component due to cold joint issues. ESR verification is mandatory.
capacitor C12 needs rework, replace it and then check if the functional behavior is back to normal.
Take off C12, clean pads, and install new part. ESR testing must pass before shipping.
Replaceing C12 with high quality unit from new reel. functional test needs to be repeated.
All screws must be re-torqued to 1.2Nm. Repeat the vib test to ensure stability.
Tighten the housing screws again, some were loose. Run vibrat. test and confirm it passes.
Check torque on all fixings. Unit needs to go back on the shaker for vibration testing.
re-torque every screw to spec. if it passes vibration test, mark as OK.
screw torque calibration failed, please redo. repeat vib. test and sign off.
adjust torque settings on assembly tool and re-tighten. Confirm pass after second vibration run.
loose screws found in calib. Re-torque and repeat vibration cycle now.
The main processor needs a firmware reflash to v2.1. Verify checksum after update.
Solder bridge found on R45. Remove excess solder and check for shorts.
housing swap required because of a scratch on the bezel. handle with care.
Label is peeling off. Replace with new thermal print label and check alignment.
Flash the firmware again, the last unit failed during the bootloader stage.
u12 ic is upside down. remove and re-solder in correct orientation.
The plastick housing is cracked. swap it for a new one from stock.
Updateing firmware to latest patch. Ensure power is stable during the process.
Wrong label applied to rear panel. peel it off and put the 'Type B' sticker instead.
Re-solder the dc jack, the joints look dry. Test for continuity.
Component R12 was missing from the pcb. solder a 10k resistor there.
The unit needs a total housing swap due to color mismatch.
reflash bios to latest version. check if the serial number is still correct.
Clean the flux residue from the board using IPA. inspect for solder balls.
Replace the damaged ribbon cable. ensure it is seated properly in the connector.
